sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, content String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, content) VALUES (1, 'Hello World');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, content) VALUES (2, 'hElLo wOrLd');
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(content, 'hello') > 0;
UPDATE test_strings SET content = 'Case Sensitive Test' WHERE positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(content, 'test') > 0;
